summary: Tested new 1099-NEC PDF generation and Tax Summary download features. All backend API tests (47) and frontend E2E tests (33) passed. New endpoints: GET /api/financials/1099/eligible/{year}, GET /api/financials/1099/generate/{year}/{email}, GET /api/financials/1099/batch/{year}, GET /api/financials/tax-summary/{year}/download (PDF/CSV). Form1099Section UI component in Step 5 displays eligible recipients and download buttons.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Tests use years 2092-2099 to avoid conflicts with production data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1099-NEC and Tax Summary download features fully tested: 1) GET /api/financials/1099/eligible/{year} returns consignors with $600+ payouts (currently none meet threshold in test data), 2) GET /api/financials/1099/generate/{year}/{email} generates individual 1099-NEC PDF, 3) GET /api/financials/1099/batch/{year} generates batch PDF with all 1099s, 4) GET /api/financials/tax-summary/{year}/download returns PDF or CSV tax summary, 5) POST /api/financials/1099/update-tin stores TIN for recipients, 6) Form1099Section UI component in Step 5 shows eligible recipients list with download buttons, IRS requirement info box, and W-9 notice. When no eligible recipients exist, shows 'No consignors received $600+ in payouts' message.

1099_eligible_endpoint.details: GET /api/financials/1099/eligible/{year} returns correct structure with eligible_count, eligible_recipients, below_threshold_count, total_to_report

1099_generate_individual.details: GET /api/financials/1099/generate/{year}/{email} returns 404 for non-existent consignor, would generate PDF for valid consignor with $600+ payouts

1099_batch_generation.details: GET /api/financials/1099/batch/{year} returns 404 when no eligible recipients, would generate batch PDF when recipients exist

tax_summary_csv_download.details: GET /api/financials/tax-summary/{year}/download?format=csv returns valid CSV with income, COGS, deductions, and net profit

update_tin_endpoint.details: POST /api/financials/1099/update-tin stores TIN (SSN or EIN) for recipients

form_1099_section_ui.details: Form1099Section component displays in Step 5 with IRS requirement info, eligible recipients list (or no recipients message), and download buttons

download_buttons_ui.details: Tax Summary PDF and CSV download buttons visible with data-testid attributes
